# GameByte Framework

> A mobile-first game development framework with Laravel-inspired architecture for 2D (Pixi.js v8) and 3D (Three.js) games. TypeScript-first with service container, facades, reactive state, and comprehensive UI components.

## Core

GameByte uses a Laravel-inspired service container with automatic provider registration.

```typescript
import { createGame, createMobileGame } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const game = createGame();
await game.initialize(canvas, '2d');  // or '3d'
game.start();

// Service container
game.bind('my.service', () => new MyService());
game.singleton('global.service', () => new GlobalService());
const service = game.make('my.service');
```

Built-in services: `'renderer'`, `'scene.manager'`, `'ui.manager'`, `'assets'`, `'audio'`, `'input'`, `'physics'`, `'performance'`

### Reactive State

```typescript
import { createState, computed } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const state = createState({ score: 0, health: 100 });
state.score += 100;
state.on('score', (newVal, oldVal) => {});
state.batch(s => { s.score++; s.health--; });
state.reset();

const total = computed(() => state.score * 2);
total.value; // auto-updates
```

### Scenes

```typescript
import { BaseScene } from 'gamebyte-framework';

class GameScene extends BaseScene {
  async onEnter() { /* setup */ }
  update(deltaTime: number) { /* game loop */ }
  async onExit() { /* cleanup */ }
}

sceneManager.register('game', new GameScene());
await sceneManager.load('game');
```

### UI Components

Pre-built: `UIButton`, `UIPanel`, `UIText`, `UIProgressBar`, `UIContainer`, `GameTooltip`, `ArcheroMenu`, `SplashScreen`

```typescript
import { UIButton, ArcheroMenu, GameTooltip } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const button = new UIButton({ text: 'PLAY', width: 200, height: 60, onClick: () => {} });
const menu = new ArcheroMenu({ sections: [{ name: 'Play', icon: '...' }], activeSection: 0 });
const tooltip = new GameTooltip({ text: 'Info', tailPosition: 'bottom-left' });
```

### Graphics Abstraction

```typescript
import { graphics } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const factory = graphics();
const container = factory.createContainer();
const text = factory.createText('Hello', { fontSize: 24 });
const gfx = factory.createGraphics();
gfx.roundRect(0, 0, 100, 50, 10).fill({ color: 0x4CAF50 });
```

### Layout (Yoga Flexbox)

```typescript
import { LayoutPresets, GameLayoutPresets, createFlexRow, createFlexColumn } from 'gamebyte-framework';

container.layout = LayoutPresets.center;
container.layout = createFlexRow({ gap: 16, justify: 'space-between' });
```

## v1.4 Game Primitives

### GameEntity

Base class for all game objects with health, collision, velocity, and lifecycle events.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new GameEntity(options: {
  x?: number;           // Initial X position (default: 0)
  y?: number;           // Initial Y position (default: 0)
  health?: number;      // Initial/max health (default: 100)
  collisionRadius?: number;  // Circle collision radius
  collisionRect?: { width: number; height: number };  // Rect collision
  tags?: string[];      // Entity tags for filtering
})
```

**Properties:**
- `x: number` -- World X position
- `y: number` -- World Y position
- `vx: number` -- Velocity X (pixels/sec)
- `vy: number` -- Velocity Y (pixels/sec)
- `speed: number` -- Computed speed magnitude
- `health: number` -- Current health
- `maxHealth: number` -- Maximum health
- `isAlive: boolean` -- health > 0
- `active: boolean` -- Whether entity is active
- `tags: string[]` -- Tags for identification/filtering
- `collisionRadius: number` -- Circle collision radius
- `collisionRect: { width, height } | null` -- Rectangle collision bounds

**Methods:**
- `update(dt: number): void` -- Update position from velocity; call each frame
- `damage(amount: number): void` -- Reduce health, emits 'damaged'; emits 'died' at 0
- `heal(amount: number): void` -- Restore health (capped at maxHealth), emits 'healed'
- `collidesWith(other: GameEntity): boolean` -- Circle or AABB collision test
- `distanceTo(other: GameEntity): number` -- Euclidean distance
- `getContainer(): IContainer` -- Get the display container for rendering
- `destroy(): void` -- Cleanup, emits 'destroyed'

**Events:**
- `'damaged'` -- `(amount: number, remaining: number)`
- `'healed'` -- `(amount: number, current: number)`
- `'died'` -- `()`
- `'destroyed'` -- `()`

**Example:**
```typescript
import { GameEntity } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const player = new GameEntity({ x: 100, y: 200, health: 100, collisionRadius: 16, tags: ['player'] });
player.on('died', () => console.log('Game over'));
player.update(dt);
scene.addChild(player.getContainer());

class Enemy extends GameEntity {
  constructor(x: number, y: number) {
    super({ x, y, health: 30, collisionRadius: 12, tags: ['enemy'] });
  }
  update(dt: number) {
    this.vx = -50;
    super.update(dt);
  }
}

if (player.collidesWith(enemy)) enemy.damage(25);
```

---

### ObjectPool\<T\>

Generic object recycling to avoid GC spikes.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new ObjectPool<T>(options: {
  create: () => T;        // Factory function to create new objects
  reset: (obj: T) => void; // Reset function when releasing back to pool
  initialSize?: number;   // Pre-allocate this many (default: 0)
  maxSize?: number;       // Maximum pool size (default: Infinity)
})
```

**Methods:**
- `acquire(): T` -- Get an object from pool (or create new)
- `release(obj: T): void` -- Return object to pool (calls reset)
- `releaseAll(): void` -- Release all active objects
- `clear(): void` -- Destroy all objects in pool

**Properties:**
- `activeCount: number` -- Objects currently in use
- `availableCount: number` -- Objects ready to acquire
- `totalCreated: number` -- Total objects created lifetime

**Example:**
```typescript
import { ObjectPool } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const bulletPool = new ObjectPool({
  create: () => ({ x: 0, y: 0, active: false }),
  reset: (b) => { b.x = 0; b.y = 0; b.active = false; },
  initialSize: 20,
  maxSize: 100,
});

const bullet = bulletPool.acquire();
bullet.x = player.x;
bulletPool.release(bullet);
```

---

### GameConfigStore\<T\>

Typed game configuration with difficulty scaling and change events.

**Factory:**
```typescript
createGameConfig<T extends Record<string, number>>(defaults: T): GameConfigStore<T>
```

**Methods:**
- `get<K extends keyof T>(key: K): T[K]` -- Read config value
- `set<K extends keyof T>(key: K, value: T[K]): void` -- Write config value, emits 'changed'
- `applyDifficulty(level: number, factors: Partial<Record<keyof T, number>>): void` -- Scale values: default * factor^level
- `reset(): void` -- Restore all values to defaults
- `getAll(): T` -- Get all values as plain object

**Events:**
- `'changed'` -- `(key: keyof T, newValue: number, oldValue: number)`

**Example:**
```typescript
import { createGameConfig } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const config = createGameConfig({
  playerSpeed: 200, enemySpeed: 80, spawnRate: 2.0, maxEnemies: 30
});

config.get('playerSpeed'); // 200
config.set('playerSpeed', 250);
config.on('changed', (key, newVal, oldVal) => {});
config.applyDifficulty(3, { enemySpeed: 1.1, spawnRate: 0.95 });
config.reset();
```

---

### screenShake()

Camera/container shake effect for impacts and explosions.

**Signatures:**
```typescript
screenShake(target: IContainer, intensity: number, duration: number): void

screenShake(options: {
  target: IContainer;
  intensity: number;         // Shake magnitude in pixels
  duration: number;          // Duration in milliseconds
  decay?: 'linear' | 'exponential';  // How shake fades (default: 'linear')
  direction?: 'both' | 'horizontal' | 'vertical'; // Axis constraint (default: 'both')
}): void
```

**Example:**
```typescript
import { screenShake } from 'gamebyte-framework';

screenShake(gameContainer, 8, 300);
screenShake({ target: gameContainer, intensity: 12, duration: 500, decay: 'exponential', direction: 'horizontal' });
```

---

### FloatingText2D

Animated damage numbers, score popups, and coin indicators that float and fade.

**Static Methods:**
- `FloatingText2D.damage(parent: IContainer, x: number, y: number, amount: number): void` -- Red damage number
- `FloatingText2D.score(parent: IContainer, x: number, y: number, amount: number): void` -- Yellow score popup
- `FloatingText2D.coin(parent: IContainer, x: number, y: number, amount: number): void` -- Orange coin text
- `FloatingText2D.heal(parent: IContainer, x: number, y: number, amount: number): void` -- Green heal text
- `FloatingText2D.spawn(options: FloatingTextOptions): void` -- Custom floating text

**FloatingTextOptions:**
```typescript
{
  text: string;
  x: number;
  y: number;
  parent: IContainer;
  style?: 'damage' | 'heal' | 'score' | 'coin';  // Color preset
  direction?: 'up' | 'down' | 'left' | 'right';  // Float direction (default: 'up')
  duration?: number;    // Animation duration ms (default: 800)
  distance?: number;    // Float distance in pixels (default: 60)
  fontSize?: number;
  color?: number;
}
```

**Example:**
```typescript
import { FloatingText2D } from 'gamebyte-framework';

FloatingText2D.damage(container, enemy.x, enemy.y, 25);
FloatingText2D.score(container, x, y, 100);
FloatingText2D.spawn({ text: 'CRITICAL!', x: 200, y: 300, parent: container, style: 'damage', duration: 1200, distance: 80 });
```

---

### WaveManager

Wave/spawn system for tower defense, roguelike, and survival games.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new WaveManager(options: {
  waves: WaveDefinition[];
  onSpawn: (type: string, waveIndex: number) => void;
  onWaveStart?: (waveIndex: number) => void;
  onWaveEnd?: (waveIndex: number) => void;
  onAllWavesComplete?: () => void;
})

interface WaveDefinition {
  enemies: EnemyGroup[];
  intermission?: number;    // Pause before next wave (ms)
  isBoss?: boolean;         // Boss wave flag
}

interface EnemyGroup {
  type: string;             // Enemy type identifier
  count: number;            // How many to spawn
  spawnInterval?: number;   // Delay between spawns (ms, default: 1000)
  delay?: number;           // Delay before this group starts (ms)
}
```

**Methods:**
- `start(): void` -- Begin wave sequence
- `pause(): void` -- Pause spawning
- `resume(): void` -- Resume spawning
- `skipToWave(n: number): void` -- Jump to wave N
- `update(dt: number): void` -- Tick; call each frame with delta in ms
- `destroy(): void` -- Cleanup

**Properties:**
- `currentWave: number` -- Current wave index (0-based)
- `totalWaves: number` -- Total number of waves
- `isActive: boolean` -- Whether wave system is running
- `isIntermission: boolean` -- Whether in intermission period
- `intermissionTimeLeft: number` -- Remaining intermission time (ms)

**Example:**
```typescript
import { WaveManager } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const wm = new WaveManager({
  waves: [
    { enemies: [{ type: 'zombie', count: 5, spawnInterval: 800 }], intermission: 3000 },
    { enemies: [{ type: 'zombie', count: 3 }, { type: 'boss', count: 1, delay: 2000 }], isBoss: true }
  ],
  onSpawn: (type, waveIdx) => spawnEnemy(type),
  onWaveStart: (idx) => showBanner(`Wave ${idx + 1}`),
  onAllWavesComplete: () => showVictory(),
});
wm.start();
// In game loop: wm.update(deltaMs);
```

---

### Grid\<T\>

2D grid data structure with cell-pixel coordinate conversion.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new Grid<T>(options: {
  rows: number;
  cols: number;
  cellSize: number;     // Cell size in pixels
  defaultValue?: T;     // Default cell value
})
```

**Methods:**
- `setCell(row: number, col: number, value: T): void`
- `getCell(row: number, col: number): T | undefined`
- `getNeighbors(row: number, col: number): Array<{ row: number; col: number; value: T }>`
- `cellToPixel(row: number, col: number): { x: number; y: number }` -- Center of cell
- `pixelToCell(x: number, y: number): { row: number; col: number } | null`
- `forEach(callback: (row: number, col: number, value: T) => void): void`
- `clear(): void`

**Properties:**
- `rows: number`, `cols: number`, `cellSize: number`

### HexGrid\<T\>

Hexagonal grid extending Grid with hex-specific operations.

**Constructor:** Same as Grid.

**Additional Methods:**
- `hexDistance(r1: number, c1: number, r2: number, c2: number): number` -- Hex manhattan distance
- `getRing(row: number, col: number, radius: number): Array<{ row: number; col: number; value: T }>` -- Ring of cells at distance
- `getArea(row: number, col: number, radius: number): Array<{ row: number; col: number; value: T }>` -- All cells within distance

**Example:**
```typescript
import { Grid, HexGrid } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const grid = new Grid({ rows: 8, cols: 8, cellSize: 64 });
grid.setCell(0, 0, 'player');
grid.getNeighbors(2, 3);
const px = grid.cellToPixel(2, 3);
const cell = grid.pixelToCell(150, 200);

const hex = new HexGrid({ rows: 10, cols: 10, cellSize: 48 });
hex.hexDistance(0, 0, 3, 2);
hex.getRing(5, 5, 2);
```

---

### GestureDetector

Touch gesture recognition for mobile games.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new GestureDetector(options: {
  target: HTMLElement;          // Element to listen on
  swipeThreshold?: number;     // Min distance for swipe (default: 50)
  longPressDelay?: number;     // Long press timeout ms (default: 500)
  doubleTapDelay?: number;     // Double tap window ms (default: 300)
})
```

**Events:**
- `'tap'` -- `(x: number, y: number)`
- `'double-tap'` -- `(x: number, y: number)`
- `'long-press'` -- `(x: number, y: number)`
- `'swipe'` -- `(direction: 'left' | 'right' | 'up' | 'down', velocity: number)`
- `'drag-start'` -- `(x: number, y: number)`
- `'drag-move'` -- `(x: number, y: number, dx: number, dy: number)`
- `'drag-end'` -- `(x: number, y: number)`
- `'pinch'` -- `(scale: number, centerX: number, centerY: number)`

**Methods:**
- `on(event: string, callback: Function): void`
- `off(event: string, callback: Function): void`
- `destroy(): void` -- Remove all listeners

**Example:**
```typescript
import { GestureDetector } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const gesture = new GestureDetector({ target: canvas, swipeThreshold: 50 });
gesture.on('tap', (x, y) => shoot(x, y));
gesture.on('swipe', (dir, velocity) => movePlayer(dir));
gesture.on('long-press', (x, y) => openMenu(x, y));
gesture.on('drag-move', (x, y, dx, dy) => panCamera(dx, dy));
gesture.on('pinch', (scale, cx, cy) => zoom(scale));
gesture.destroy();
```

---

### SaveSystem\<T\>

Persistent save with versioned migrations and auto-save to localStorage.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new SaveSystem<T extends Record<string, any>>(options: {
  key: string;               // localStorage key
  version: number;           // Current save version
  defaults: T;               // Default values for new saves
  migrations?: Record<number, (old: any) => any>;  // version N -> N+1 transforms
})
```

**Methods:**
- `load(): T` -- Load save from localStorage; runs migrations if needed
- `save(): void` -- Persist current state to localStorage
- `get<K extends keyof T>(key: K): T[K]` -- Read a save value
- `set<K extends keyof T>(key: K, value: T[K]): void` -- Write a value (auto-saves)
- `reset(): void` -- Clear save, revert to defaults
- `export(): string` -- Export save as JSON string
- `import(data: string): void` -- Import save from JSON string

**Example:**
```typescript
import { SaveSystem } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const save = new SaveSystem({
  key: 'my-game',
  version: 2,
  defaults: { score: 0, level: 1, inventory: [] },
  migrations: {
    1: (old) => ({ ...old, inventory: old.items ?? [] })
  }
});

const data = save.load();
save.set('score', 500);
save.get('level'); // 1
save.reset();
```

---

### EconomyManager

Currency management and shop system with exponential price scaling.

**Constructor:**
```typescript
new EconomyManager(currencies: Array<{
  id: string;
  name: string;
  initial?: number;    // Starting balance (default: 0)
  max?: number;        // Maximum balance (default: Infinity)
}>)
```

**Methods:**
- `add(currency: string, amount: number): void` -- Add to balance (capped at max)
- `spend(currency: string, amount: number): boolean` -- Deduct if affordable; returns success
- `canAfford(currency: string, amount: number): boolean` -- Check if balance sufficient
- `getBalance(currency: string): number` -- Current balance
- `registerItems(items: ShopItem[]): void` -- Register purchasable items
- `purchase(itemId: string): boolean` -- Buy item; deducts cost, returns success

**Static Methods:**
- `EconomyManager.getUpgradeCost(baseCost: number, level: number, factor: number): number` -- Returns `baseCost * factor^level`

**ShopItem:**
```typescript
{
  id: string;
  name: string;
  cost: { currency: string; amount: number };
  maxPurchases?: number;   // Purchase limit (default: Infinity)
}
```

**Events:**
- `'balance-changed'` -- `(currency: string, newBalance: number, oldBalance: number)`
- `'insufficient-funds'` -- `(currency: string, needed: number, have: number)`
- `'item-purchased'` -- `(itemId: string, cost: { currency: string; amount: number })`

**Example:**
```typescript
import { EconomyManager } from 'gamebyte-framework';

const economy = new EconomyManager([
  { id: 'gold', name: 'Gold', initial: 100 },
  { id: 'gems', name: 'Gems', initial: 0, max: 9999 }
]);

economy.add('gold', 50);
economy.spend('gold', 30);
economy.canAfford('gold', 200);
economy.on('insufficient-funds', (curr, needed, have) => showWarning());

economy.registerItems([
  { id: 'sword', name: 'Iron Sword', cost: { currency: 'gold', amount: 50 }, maxPurchases: 1 }
]);
economy.purchase('sword');
EconomyManager.getUpgradeCost(100, 3, 1.15); // 152
```

## Import Paths

All v1.4 primitives are available from the main package entry point:

```typescript
import {
  GameEntity,
  ObjectPool,
  createGameConfig,
  screenShake,
  FloatingText2D,
  WaveManager,
  Grid,
  HexGrid,
  GestureDetector,
  SaveSystem,
  EconomyManager
} from 'gamebyte-framework';
```

Sub-path imports for tree-shaking:

| Feature | Sub-path Import |
|---------|----------------|
| Core (createGame, createMobileGame) | `@gamebyte/framework/core` |
| Rendering (PixiRenderer, ThreeRenderer) | `@gamebyte/framework/rendering` |
| UI (UIButton, UIPanel, ArcheroMenu, etc.) | `@gamebyte/framework/ui` |
| UI Components | `@gamebyte/framework/ui/components` |
| UI Screens | `@gamebyte/framework/ui/screens` |
| UI Panels | `@gamebyte/framework/ui/panels` |
| UI Effects (CelebrationManager, etc.) | `@gamebyte/framework/ui/effects` |
| UI Themes | `@gamebyte/framework/ui/themes` |
| UI Cards | `@gamebyte/framework/ui/components/cards` |
| Audio | `@gamebyte/framework/audio` |
| Input | `@gamebyte/framework/input` |
| Physics | `@gamebyte/framework/physics` |
| Physics 2D (Matter.js) | `@gamebyte/framework/physics/2d` |
| Physics 3D (Cannon.js) | `@gamebyte/framework/physics/3d` |
| Graphics | `@gamebyte/framework/graphics` |
| Scenes | `@gamebyte/framework/scenes` |
| Layout (Yoga flexbox) | `@gamebyte/framework/layout` |
| Facades | `@gamebyte/framework/facades` |
| Contracts (interfaces) | `@gamebyte/framework/contracts` |
| Utils | `@gamebyte/framework/utils` |
| Performance | `@gamebyte/framework/performance` |
| Three.js Toolkit | `@gamebyte/framework/three-toolkit` |
| Three.js Lights | `@gamebyte/framework/three/lights` |
| Three.js Loaders | `@gamebyte/framework/three/loaders` |
| Three.js Animation | `@gamebyte/framework/three/animation` |
| Three.js Events | `@gamebyte/framework/three/events` |
| Three.js Instancing | `@gamebyte/framework/three/instancing` |
| Merge Games Toolkit | `@gamebyte/framework/merge` |
| Tick System | `@gamebyte/framework/tick` |
| Resources | `@gamebyte/framework/resources` |
| Post-processing | `@gamebyte/framework/postprocessing` |

## Pixi.js v8 API

GameByte uses Pixi.js v8 (not legacy v7). Key patterns:

```typescript
// Graphics
graphics.rect(0, 0, 100, 50);
graphics.roundRect(0, 0, 100, 50, 10);
graphics.circle(50, 50, 25);
graphics.fill({ color: 0xFF0000, alpha: 0.8 });
graphics.stroke({ color: 0x000000, width: 2 });

// Gradients
import { FillGradient } from 'pixi.js';
const gradient = new FillGradient({
  type: 'linear',
  colorStops: [{ offset: 0, color: 'red' }, { offset: 1, color: 'blue' }],
  textureSpace: 'local'
});
graphics.rect(0, 0, 100, 100).fill(gradient);
```
